name: aria51-monorepo
description: Monorepo for aria51 - Generic accessibility testing with optional React support and AI-powered auditing

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @aria51/core build && pnpm --filter @aria51/components --filter @aria51/ai-auditor build && pnpm --filter @aria51/agent build && pnpm --filter @aria51/cli --filter @aria51/mcp build
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules && rm -rf node_modules

author: Justin Irizarry
